---
title: "Chris Edwards"
image: "images/profile.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/edchris/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/edchris_"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:c8.edwards@qut.edu.au"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
 


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```
